The Best Widgets for Your Business

MockCorp is the leading provider of enterprise widgets. Our widgets help over 10,000 businesses automate their workflows and reduce costs by 40%. Founded in 2020 by Jane Smith, we have grown to serve clients in 30 countries.

Why Choose MockCorp Widgets?

Our widgets are built with cutting-edge technology and backed by a team of 50 engineers. We offer 24/7 support and a 99.9% uptime SLA. According to a 2025 Gartner report, MockCorp is a Leader in the Widget Management quadrant.

  • Enterprise-grade security
  • API-first architecture
  • Real-time analytics dashboard

What is a Widget?

A widget is a reusable component that automates a specific business process. Widgets can be composed together to build complex workflows without writing code.

PlanPriceFeatures
Starter$29/mo5 widgets
Pro$99/moUnlimited widgets

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I get started with MockCorp?

Sign up for a free trial at mockcorp.com/signup. No credit card required.

What integrations are supported?

We support Slack, Jira, GitHub, and 200+ other tools via our API.

Is there a free tier?

Yes, our Starter plan includes 5 widgets at no cost for the first 30 days.
